title: Dutch Marzipan Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with sweet marzipan, perfect for a dessert snack.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut out squares of dough, about 3 inches per side.
Place a tablespoon of marzipan in the center of each square.
Fold the dough over the marzipan to form a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Dip the fritters in the silky milk, then roll in fritters for coating.
Fry the fritters in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve warm.
